ab: kemuda u zuwa i kani?
en: A: How did you get here?

ab: kemakawang ku zuwa i kani.
en: I came on foot.

ab: muitras u za eman palizingan zuwa?
en: A: What kind of car did you take?

ab: muitras ku za bas zuwa.
en: B: I came by bus.

ab: kemuda u mukuwa i kiyukay?
en: A: How do you go to church?

ab: mipalizing i amalri puitras kaninku salrangan mi mukuwa.
en: B: Dad drove me with him.

ab: kemuda mukuwa i takesiyan marayas intaw?
en: A: How does he usually go to school?

ab: muitras za ciē-yun mukuwa i takesiyan intaw.
en: B: He took the subway to school.

ab: kemuda mukuwa tremima’a za kulang i temu na vavayan?
en: A: How does your grandmother go to the grocery store?

ab: miotobay mukuwa tremima’a za kulang intaw.
en: B: She went to the grocery store on a motorcycle.

ab: kuwadakuda u mukuwa i Vutrulr?
en: A: How are you going to get to Orchid Island?

ab: uwaitras ku za sudang mukuwa i Vutrulr.
en: B: I want to take a boat to Lanyu.

ab: kemudakuda mukuwa i Vutrulr intaw?
en: A: How did he get to Orchid Island?

ab: muitras za hikuki mukuwa i Vutrulr intaw.
en: B: He took a plane to Orchid Island.

ab: muitras za eman palizingan mukuwa i Takaw intaw?
en: A: What bus did he take to Kaohsiung?

ab: muitras za kaw-tiē mukuwa intaw.
en: B: He took the THSR to Kaohsiung.

ab: muitras za kisiya mukuwa i Valangaw intaw?
en: A: Did he take a train to Taitung?

ab: ai, muitras za kisiya mukuwa i Valangaw intaw.
en: B: Yes, he took a train to Taitung.

ab: i intaw mu, muitras za kisiya mukuwa i Valangaw?
en: A: Did he take a train to Taitung?

ab: amelri, muitras za hikuki mukuwa i Valangaw intaw.
en: B: No, he took a plane to Taitung.

ab: ulra a siyataw za bas adalrep i kani?
en: A: Is there a bus stop near here?

ab: ulra, kakawang pingawayan nana’u u za siyataw za bas.
ch: B:有，往前走就會看到公車站了。
en: B: Yes, if you go straight ahead, you will see the bus stop.

ab: ulra i iyan na maraadalredalrep na siyataw kana ciē-yun i kani?
ch: A:離這裡最近的捷運站在哪裡?
en: A: Where is the nearest MRT station?

ab: iniyan za siyataw kana ciē-yun i kani, mawmau a kētēsiya nu uwaitrasan.
ch: B:這裡沒有捷運站，你只能坐計程車。
en: B: There is no MRT station here, you can only take a taxi.

ab: uniyan za siyataw za ciē-yun i kani, mawmau a kētēsiya nu uwaitrasan.
ch: B:這裡沒有捷運站，你只能坐計程車。
en: B: There is no MRT station here, you can only take a taxi.

ab: nu muitras za bas mu, kemuda kana sawariyan zi raredek i takesiyan?
en: A:How long does it take to get to the school by bus?

ab: muketrep misama’ za lruwatra pung mu, raredek i takesiyan.
en: B:15 minutes to school.

ab: nu muitras za kaw-tiē mu, kemuda kana sawariyan zi raredek i Taycong?
ch: A:搭高鐵要多久時間會到臺中?
en: A: How long does it take to get to Taichung by THSR?

ab: saya tuki raredek i Taycong.
en: B: I will come to Taichung in an hour.

ab: sawariyan nu mipalizing ta mukuwa i Katratripulr?
en: A: Is it a long drive to Chihpen?

ab: karuwa za saya tuki.
en: B: It takes about an hour.

ab: nu muitras u ciē-yun mu, kemuda kana sawariyan zuwa i kaniyam?
ch: A:你搭捷運來我家要多久?
en: A: How long did it take you to come to my house by subway?

ab: makavetra’an pung.
en: B: 20 minutes.

ab: malrazam u mizidēnsiya?
en: A: Do you know how to ride a bicycle?

ab: malrazam ku mizidēnsiya.
en: B: I can ride a bicycle.

ab: ulra nu otobay?
en: A: Do you have a motorcycle?

ab: ulra ku otobay a saya.
en: B: I have a motorcycle.

ab: ulra nu otobay?
en: A: Do you have a motorcycle?

ab: iniyan ku za otobay.
en: B: I don't have a motorcycle.

ab: uniyan ku za otobay.
en: B: I don't have a motorcycle.
